Śrī Gauḍīya Gīti-guccha · Compiled under the guidance of Śrī Śrīmad Bhaktivedānta Nārāyaṇa Gosvāmī Mahārāja · 7th Edition, 2016 ·

About This Site

The songs on this site are from the Śrī Gauḍīya Gīti-guccha — an anthology of Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava songs compiled under the guidance of Śrī Śrīmad Bhaktivedānta Nārāyaṇa Gosvāmī Mahārāja, 7th Edition, 2016.

This website was created by Acyuta Priya dāsī as a devotional service to make these sacred songs more accessible to practitioners and seekers.

For questions or to report any issues, please reach out on Facebook:
facebook.com/acyuta.priya.2024

❁ Hare Kṛṣṇa ❁
